examples:
!cve cve="CVE-2021-26086"
Human Readable Output
#
CVE: CVE-2021-26086 is found
#
GreyNoise CVE Lookup
#
CVE ID

outputs.description: CVE ID. GreyNoise.CVE.details.vulnerability_name The vulnerability name.
outputs.name: CVE.ID

outputs.description: A description of the vulnerability. GreyNoise.CVE.details.cve_cvss_score The CVSS score.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.details.vulnerability_description

outputs.description: The vulnerable product. GreyNoise.CVE.details.vendor The vendor that produces the vulnerable product.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.details.product

outputs.description: Is this CVE published to NIST NVD? GreyNoise.CVE.timeline.cve_published_date Date
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.details.published_to_nist_nvd

outputs.description: GreyNoise.CVE.timeline.cve_last_updated_date Date When was the CVE information last updated.
outputs.name: When was the CVE published.

outputs.description: Date When first exploit associated with CVE was published. GreyNoise.CVE.timeline.cisa_kev_date_added
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.timeline.first_known_published_date

outputs.description: When the CVE was added to KEV. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_details.attack_vector The attack vector category.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Whether any known exploits are available. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_details.exploitation_registered_in_kev Whether exploitation has been registered in KEV database.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_details.exploit_found

outputs.description: EPSS score associated with this exploitation (Exploit Prediction Scoring System). GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_stats.number_of_available_exploits The total number of exploits available (public + commercial).
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_details.epss_score

outputs.description: The total number of known threat actors. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_stats.number_of_botnets_exploiting_vulnerability The total number of botnets.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_stats.number_of_threat_actors_exploiting_vulnerability

outputs.description: Whether GreyNoise has seen activity. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.benign_ip_count_1d The total number of benign IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last day.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.activity_seen

outputs.description: The total number of benign IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last 10 days. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.benign_ip_count_30d The total number of benign IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last 30 days.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.benign_ip_count_10d

outputs.description: The total number of threat IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last day. GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.threat_ip_count_10d The total number of threat IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last 10 days.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.threat_ip_count_1d

outputs.description: The total number of threat IP addresses GreyNoise has seen exercising (Scanning or Exploiting) this vulnerability in the last 30 days. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.CVE.exploitation_activity.threat_ip_count_30d

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
